name: Sylvamo Corporation
description: Sylvamo Corporation is a global paper company headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, that specializes in the production and marketing of uncoated freesheet paper. As a leading manufacturer, the company produces a family of trusted brands used for cutsize, offset printing, and converting applications across North America, Latin America, and Europe. Sylvamo is committed to sustainable forestry and ethical operations, transforming renewable natural resources into high-quality paper products that facilitate communication, education, and entertainment while maintaining a focus on long-term value creation for its shareowners and stakeholders.
